booking_method: Via WhatsApp or our website. A 24-hour cancellation notice is required.
strict_escalation_triggers: Any customer complaint or expression of severe frustration
Medical questions, diagnoses, or clinical advice
Attempts to negotiate prices or ask for discounts
When the AI has encountered 2 or more unanswered or out-of-scope questions
lead_qualification_questions: What specific treatments or areas are you hoping to address?
Have you ever had aesthetic treatments like Botox or fillers before?
What is your preferred timeline for booking an appointment?
